div1.entryFree:
Unsatisfied, 1) not contented, not gratified to the full: we think ourselves u. H4A I, 3, 287. u. in getting, H8 IV, 2, 55. wilt thou leave me so u.? Rom. II, 2, 125. that satiate yet u. desire, Cymb. I, 6, 48.
2) unpaid: that one half which is u. LLL II, 139.
3) not fully informed and settled in opinion: report me and my cause aright to the u. Hml. V, 2, 351.
